tavily.answer: In 2025, the number of internal displacements caused by violence or conflict reached a record high, surpassing those caused by natural disasters for the first time, according to a report by the Internal Displacement Monitoring Centre. In Italy, two Pakistani nationals were arrested after four migrant workers, including three Afghans and one Pakistani, were found burned alive in a minivan in the Calabria region. Additionally, Israel has halted humanitarian aid to Gaza until further notice due to security concerns and Iranian missile fire.
